description: Perform an Ordinal Logistic Regression analysis using the Big Five Personality Traits dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv) to predict the response to item 'A1' ('Am indifferent to the feelings of others') based on 'Gender' and 'Age'. Ensure 'A1' is treated as an ordinal variable and include the McFadden R² value and the Test of parallel lines (Proportional odds assumption) in the analysis. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Ordinal_A1_Analysis.jasp and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ordinal_report.txt containing the McFadden R² value, the p-value for the Test of parallel lines, and a statement on whether the proportional odds assumption holds.
